programme.title: Monk
programme.desc: Monk tries to prove a sports agent is guilty of murder while helping Natalie’s teenage daughter with her love life.
programme.sub-title: Mr. Monk and the Birds and the Bees

programme.title: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas
programme.desc: The big-screen version of Hunter S. Thompson's seminal psychedelic classic about his road trip across Western America as he and his large Samoan lawyer searched desperately for the "American dream"... they were helped in large part by the huge amount of drugs and alcohol kept in their convertible, The Red Shark.

programme.title: Tetris
programme.desc: An enterprising game developer risks everything in a race to outmaneuver duplicitous insiders to negotiate a deal with Soviet Union bureaucrats for the international licensing rights to what would eventually become one of the most recognizable and widely played games in history.

programme.title: Doctor Who (2005)
programme.desc: Martha takes her first trip in the Tardis, all the way back to Elizabethan England. She and the Doctor hear of a series of bizarre deaths and discover that playwright William Shakespeare is being controlled by dangerous witch-like creatures. It seems the time-travelling duo must defeat ancient forces to prevent history from being rewritten.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to The Silverton in Shrewsbury where business partners Donna and David offer complimentary earplugs, but some guests are concerned about road noise.
